title: Finished watching TV Series and The End of EvaQUESTIONS
display_title: Finished watching TV Series and The End of EvaQUESTIONS
wikitext:
[]: Finished watching TV Series and The End of Eva(QUESTIONS) Post by Omegaoly » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:04 am hi guys i am new to the forum and new to the evangelion series.i recently finished watching the 26 episodes and The End of Evangelion.i have some questions if anyone can answer i would really appreciate it 1.Why Gendo choosed Shinji as the pilot fot EVA 1? 2.What exactly is Rei?Why ritsuko's mother said tha she looks like Shinji mother?is she an artificial human?i remember that she was born in an underground lab and that there are many Reis like Rei 1,2 and 3. 3.Why Rei was so kind towards Gendo and why in The End Of Evangelion she betrayed him? 4.Is Ryoji a triple agent?or the only thing he wanted was to find the truth about Evas and Nerv?who killed him anyway? 5.Is Shinji's mom dead or she just disapeared?why in The End of Evangelion Ikari tells Rei that they will meet Shinji mom? 6.Does Misato and Asuka have any love feelings for Shinji and the opposite?(i am sure about Asuka) 7.What exactly happened in The End Of Evangelion?From what i understand is that Rei destroyed all the world and Seele activated the Eva things to fuse with Rei and cause something like a Third Impact.In the end Shinji with Asuka are the only one to survive in the world.How Asuka survived? 8.Why Shinji tries to strugle Asuka in the end?i think he stops when he finds out she is alive.Is Asuka alive?and what she means in the end with the word ''disgusting....'' 9.is there any chance tha one day we will see a sequel to The End Of Evangelion(i am not talking about Rebuild of Evangelion movies. I know these are a lot of questions but if someone could answer them for me i would really appreciate it

[]: Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:22 am The answers to all of these questions can be found by reading threads in this forum. Take some time to look around at previous discussion before making threads with questions. You'll find that many if not most have been asked before. Use the Search and Thread functions to help you find information. You can also look in the wiki .

[]: Re: Finished watching TV Series and The End of Eva(QUESTIONS Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:10 pm Rather than so directly shut down a newcomer's earnest questions while they're in the "what the hell did I just watch?" state, I'll put in the minimal set of answers >1.Why Gendo choosed Shinji as the pilot fot EVA 1? Because it is now the vessel of Yui Ikari's soul : implied episode 16, 19; explicit episode 24' (extended DC version) >2.What exactly is Rei? Implied by episode 20,21 -- Something constructed out of the LCL into which Yui dissolved, but with part of the soul of Lilith (episode 25). >3.Why Rei was so kind towards Gendo and why in The End Of Evangelion she betrayed him? Gendo was a better father to her than to Shinji (see e.g. episode 5), but in the end, as she became aware of who/what she was, she had a different agenda to follow. >4.Is Ryoji a triple agent? Yes (at least). Shot by some nameless SEELE goon. >5.Is Shinji's mom dead or she just disapeared? See q.1; during EoE she has reasssuring words for Shinji, but at the end leaves him in a most final way to take a long jaunt around the cosmos. >6.Does Misato and Asuka have any love feelings for Shinji A subject of much debate Misato : Search for "Big Irony Bomb" also threads like http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3287 Asuka : See e.g. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5511 and links therein >7.What exactly happened in The End Of Evangelion?From what i understand is that Rei destroyed all the world and Seele activated the Eva things to fuse with Rei and cause something like a Third Impact.In the end Shinji with Asuka are the only one to survive in the world.How Asuka survived? The short answer is "Third Impact happened". Given the violence of events that took place around the GeoFront/Black moon, even if Asuka was still alive after the harpies had feasted, it is unlikely she lived. However, the Rei-swarm were busily gathering up souls, so presumably she was collected like everyone else. She then re-embodied as Shinji did in episode 20. > 8.Why Shinji tries to strangle Asuka in the end? Many, many threads http://www.google.co.uk/search?q=site%3Aforum.evageeks.org+strangle http://www.google.co.uk/search?q=site%3Aforum.evageeks.org+choke >9.is there any chance that one day we will see a sequel to The End Of Evangelion There is the "After the End" audio drama aka episode 27. More seriously, as Anno seems unwilling to leave well enough alone, we might; but I would expect anything like it more likely to be part of the Rebuild continuity.

[]: Re: Finished watching TV Series and The End of Eva(QUESTIONS Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:53 pm I'll add my own input as well. First off, you should familiarize yourself with this if you haven't: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29 1.Why Gendo choosed Shinji as the pilot fot EVA 1?
